top_signals.title: Signos grows foothold in weight loss wave fueled by GLP-1s with its AI health data tracking
top_signals.summary: Health tech startup Signos announced a $20 million funding round Wednesday, including an expanded partnership with medical device giant Dexcom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
